architecture.summary: Two files modified: ado-client.ts error handling, external-issue-auto-creator.ts metadata fallback. No new components.

integrations.summary: ADO REST API v7.0/7.1 unchanged. Fix error handling for existing linkWorkItems PATCH calls. 409 treated as idempotent success.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. Backend-only bug fix in ADO sync code.

performance.summary: No performance impact. Error handling change adds one status check per link call.

security.summary: No security changes. ADO PAT handling unchanged. No new API surfaces.

edge-cases.summary: 409 duplicate link handled as success. Missing storyItemMap entries skip metadata instead of corrupting. Existing callers try-catch covers thrown errors.
